Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}Do you know how to use the DVD player here? I thought I'd might as well use it once in a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have this compilation of some of the greatest matches between boxing legends.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Watching professional techniques like this will surely help us in our own battles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0801_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3009 0 0}It's important to let your muscles rest now and then, even if there's no competition the next day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I was thinking of doing just that today. Instead of my usual training, I'll watch a DVD.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a compilation of some of the greatest matches between boxing legends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching a boxing DVD with Sanada[n]might help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wanna watch it together if you have time now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}I'm thinking of watching another boxing DVD here today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a documentary about two champs who were rivals.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0801_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}I'm thinking of watching another boxing DVD here today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a documentary about two champs who were rivals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe you'll find someone who you can call your rival at tomorrow's tournament.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching a boxing DVD with Sanada[n]might help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wanna watch it together if you have the time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Hey, good timing. Wanna watch another DVD together?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's a match with the heavyweight champ who many consider to be the greatest of all time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I burned the TV recording of it onto a DVD a while ago, and I suddenly feel like watching it again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0801_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Hey, good timing. Wanna watch another DVD together?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a match with the heavyweight champ who many consider to be the greatest of all time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not sure if this will help with your tournament tomorrow, but hey, maybe you'll be inspired.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sanada's eyes are glistening[n]with excitement...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching a boxing DVD with him might[n]help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sanada might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}What do you say? We can start it right away if you're up for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3005 0 0}Boxing has a long history, and there are still many great fights to this day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I borrowed a new DVD from the guys on my boxing team. Feel like watching it with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0801_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}I've heard that watching sports other than your own can be good for studying, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Like boxing. It has a long history, and there are still many great fights to this day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I borrowed a new DVD from the guys on my boxing team. Feel like watching it with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Sanada will gain any more[n]new skills even if I watch a DVD with him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But watching a boxing DVD with him might[n]help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}A collection of the best KO's and a ranking of the greatest bouts of all time... Sounds interesting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3085 0 0}All right, let's start watching.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3023 0 0}All right, let me know if you feel like it later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Sanada will gain any more[n]new skills even if I watch a DVD with him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But watching a boxing DVD with him might[n]help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching a boxing DVD with Sanada might[n]help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll get it ready now if you want to watch it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have to eat enough to make up for what I burn during training, so it ends up being a lot of food.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's easier to just cook it all at once. I'd appreciate your help, if you have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0930_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}By the way... do you know how to cook?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}I need to make up for what I burn while training, and even more so with our next operation soon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}So it's a lot of food, but it's easier to just cook it all at once. I'd appreciate your help, if you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Sanada wants[n]me to cook with him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Sanada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, can I count on you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Can you help me out with cooking again? It's a lot for me to do by myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Sanada wants[n]me to cook with him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I already have all the ingredients. So, can you help me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I got some good news, so I was thinking of splurging and cooking up something nice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0930_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I got some good news, so I was thinking of splurging and cooking up something nice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Plus, our next operation is coming up. Probably not a bad idea to replenish your strength, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Sanada seems enthusiastic.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sanada might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}How about it? Why don't you join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}I'm about to run out of my protein-packed food stock.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you aren't busy, wanna help me make more?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0930_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3066 0 0}I mentioned earlier that I expanded my training menu, didn't I?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}Well, because of that, I'm about to run out of my protein-packed food stock...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you aren't busy, wanna help me make more?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Sanada will gain any[n]more new skills even if I cook with him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Of course, you can take a portion for yourself, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Sanada will gain any[n]more new skills even if I cook with him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Sanada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a bit much to do all on my own, you see.[n]{f 1 1}
